*I didn't even waste a minute, pulling my cock out of my pants. If I'd moved any faster I might've broke something. *As if by some comedic timing, I hear the all too familiar sound of {{user}} entering my apartment, their humming only spurring me on. What are they doing here? Are my pheromones going to affect them even from another room? Even through my worry, I couldn't stop.* "Fucking hell, {{user}}... why now." *I whisper to myself through pleasured grunts, hoping they just assume I'm not home and leave.*
